title: Artificial intelligence solutions | Siemens
body: Industrial artificial intelligence We're accelerating the industrial AI era Industrial AI is AI purpose-built for the real world — for the factories, grids, buildings and transportation systems where reliability, safety, and precision aren't optional. Explore AI products Just launched: Eigen Engineering Agent At Hannover Messe, Siemens unveiled the Eigen Engineering Agent – moving industrial AI from assistance to autonomous execution. Learn more Siemens Xcelerator Explore our AI products We combine decades of industrial data, deep domain expertise and advanced AI to help customers move faster across the entire lifecycle — from engineering and design to operations. Through Siemens Xcelerator, we make trusted industrial AI accessible to all. Generative AI / Copilots all Industrial Copilot Generative AI assistant that generates code, diagnoses faults, and supports natural-language interaction across engineering and operations Digital Twin / Simulation all Digital Twin Composer Simulate with AI. Anything from factories, to products and processes, using high-fidelity virtual models built on NVIDIA Omniverse Maintenance / Operations all Senseye Predictive Maintenance AI that covers the full maintenance journey – from reactive repair to prediction and optimization Data Science / Analytics all Rapidminer Data science and machine learning platform for building, deploying and managing AI models at scale Mobility / Rail all Railigent X AI-enabled fleet management for rail operators, achieving 99%+ service availability with predictive analytics Asset Health / Monitoring all Drivetrain Analyzer Cloud Cloud-based AI that monitors and diagnoses drivetrain health in across rotating equipment EDA / Semiconductors all Fuse EDA AI System AI-accelerated electronic design automation that speeds up verification, layout and process Quality / Visual Inspection all Inspekto AI system that inspects quality visually and autonomously directly on the production line AI Engineering all Eigen Engineering Agent Eliminating repetitive efforts for engineers with AI that completes automation engineering tasks end‑to‑end seamlessly connected in TIA Portal to boost efficiency and quality. Technology What is industrial AI? Industrial AI is AI purpose-built for the real world: The factories, buildings, trains, power grids, and hospitals that keep our economies running. Unlike consumer AI, industrial AI must work in environments where reliability, safety, and precision are critical priorities. AI glossary This glossary of the most important key terms can help broaden your understanding and delve deeper into this fascinating world. Read more Industrial AI and sustainability This new report explores how AI is helping organizations realize their sustainability goals. It provides an in-depth analysis of the current and projected impact of industrial AI accelerating transformative change. Read the report AI learning hub Gain a deep understanding of AI and machine learning. Our training programs are designed to equip you with the insights and tools needed to drive innovation in your field. Start a course Industries The impact of AI on industry and infrastructure Through technology, partnerships, and customer stories across manufacturing, buildings, transportation, grids, and AI infrastructure, we'll show how Siemens is accelerating Industrial AI and delivering real-world impact with customers and partners. 30% 30% Reduced cooling costs in data centers Optimize temperature management with AI-powered cooling to minimize manual intervention. This enhances efficiency and supports more sustainable data center operations by lowering energy consumption. More on data centers 50% 50% Reduced manual engineering for hydrogen plants For hydrogen plants. Streamline plant design and engineering using generative AI. Reduce project timelines from months to weeks, enabling you to scale up green hydrogen production faster and more efficiently. More on hydrogen plants 9% 9% Improved energy efficiency in commercial buildings Modernize outdated systems with AI-enabled edge controllers. Leverage real-time data to automate building optimization, breaking down data silos and making operations more affordable and sustainable. Explore Siemens Xcelerator Industrial AI in practice Across manufacturing, energy, and buildings, Siemens industrial AI is generating measurable results in throughput, efficiency, cost, and uptime. These are deployed systems, in operating facilities, with outcomes that can be counted. PepsiCo deployed Siemens Digital Twin Composer to simulate and optimize production line changes before any physical modifications. This led to a 20% increase in throughput at a Gatorade facility within three months, while reducing capital expenditure by 10–15% by uncovering hidden capacity. Read PepsiCo's story The new AI-powered robotized picking system is the result of a solid partnership between Mecalux and Siemens, combining knowledge and experience from both companies in industrial AI technology. Read Mecalux' story The Siemens Industrial Copilot is our generative AI assistant that empowers people across the value chain. It simplifies complex tasks like code generation and fault diagnostics through natural language, helping human experts focus on innovation and high-value problem-solving. Learn about our Copilots An innovative vertical farm in Dubai – among the largest in the world – is using Siemens technology to push new food production solutions to their fullest potential. Read Bustanica's story Stories from the industry CUSTOMER STORY AI-supported maintenance enables high plant efficiency Sachsenmilch, one of the largest dairies in Europe, uses Senseye Predictive Maintenance in its heterogeneous production-plant infrastructure. ARTICLE Busting myths on AI-based visual inspection Athina Liatsa, global marketing manager for industrial apps at Siemens, dispels five myths surrounding AI-based visual inspection. CUSTOMER STORY Al-based apps protect Southern Europe's water resources Water scarcity poses a significant challenge in many parts of Southern Europe, demanding innovative solutions for responsible water management. CUSTOMER STORY Guarding the plant: Robot dogs for safety & reliability By utilizing a robot version of man’s best friend, process industries can enhance worker safety and improve maintenance work. ARTICLE Scaling industrial AI to ease skilled labor shortages An $8.5 trillion talent shortage looms. But the scaling of industrial AI is charting a path toward a brighter future. CUSTOMER STORY BlueScope's predictive leap with Senseye Bluescope is transforming its maintenance approach and making it future-proof by relying on Senseye Predictive Maintenance. People in the loop While industrial AI excels at data processing and automation, humans provide the accountability and contextual judgment to navigate real-world nuances. These three stories show how experts use AI to drive safety, efficiency, and continuous improvement. DAIRY MAINTENANCE MANAGER A manager at Sachsenmilch used Senseye AI to find a pump failure weeks early. This let the team fix it during a planned stop, saving a six-figure sum and preventing the loss of thousands of liters of milk. How AI supports manufacturing operations WATER UTILITY OPERATOR Operators in Spain use SIWA Leak Finder to catch leaks as small as 0.2 liters per second. By pinpointing 10,000 events, they dispatch crews with precision, saving water and lowering costs for the community. How AI manages building and data center systems WATER DEVELOPMENT ENGINEER At VA SYD, engineers trained AI to monitor 2,000 km of pipe. It caught tiny leaks that sensors missed, cutting water loss from 10% to 8% and preventing major bursts before they could disrupt the city's supply. How AI supports transport and logistics operations PODCAST SERIES Human & AI Our AI Lab presents podcast filled with the voices of those who re raising awareness for the potential of AI across Siemens. Start listening OUR PERSPECTIVE Siemens at CES 2026 Siemens demonstrated its integrated AI approach at CES 2026, showing how intelligence moves through a unified stack from engineering models to production data, edge inference to cloud deployment. One platform. Every industrial context. No reinvention required. Watch the Siemens CES keynote Join us for the industrial AI revolution Unlock the full potential of Industrial AI by uniting every layer required for true data intelligence.
